mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_image (user_id, topic_id, filename, oss_url, storage_type, file_size, is_public, audit_status, upload_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, #{filename}, #{ossUrl}, #{storageType}, #{fileSize}, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_image
filename = #{filename},
topic_id = #{topicId},
oss_url = #{ossUrl},
storage_type = #{storageType},
file_size = #{fileSize},
is_public = #{isPublic},
audit_status = #{auditStatus},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, topic_id AS topicId, filename, oss_url AS ossUrl, storage_type AS storageType, file_size AS fileSize, is_public AS isPublic, audit_status AS auditStatus, upload_time AS uploadTime FROM biz_image WHERE audit_status != 4 AND id IN
#{id}

SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, filename, oss_url, storage_type, file_size, is_public, audit_status, upload_time FROM biz_image
audit_status != 4 AND
(user_id = #{userId} OR (is_public = 1 AND audit_status = 2))
user_id = #{userId}
AND topic_id = #{topicId}
AND filename LIKE CONCAT(#{filename}, '%')
ORDER BY upload_time DESC
